ATP Steps: Open app through gallery then verify camera UI
ATP Expected: User should be able to open the app's camera from the gallery

Test Name: CA_02 - Open camera go back to gallery
ATP Steps: 1. Open app → 2. Tap camera icon (bottom-right) → 3. Tap return (top-left)
ATP Expected: User should be able to open the app camera and go back to gallery
User should be able to capture a photo and proceed to print

ATP Steps: Open camera → selfie → capture → verify UI
ATP Expected: User should be able to capture a selfie photo

ATP Steps: Open camera → flash → capture → preview → close → verify camera
ATP Expected: User should be able to capture a photo with flash enabled

ATP Steps: Open camera → swipe filter → capture → verify preview
ATP Expected: User should be able to capture a photo after applying a live filter

ATP Steps: Open camera → Scan → dismiss tip → verify AR scan
ATP Expected: User should be able to open AR scan from the camera screen

ATP Steps: Attempt camera → deny permission → verify blocked
ATP Expected: When camera permission is denied the user cannot use the camera

ATP Steps: Open camera → capture 3× → verify camera still open
ATP Expected: User should be able to capture multiple photos rapidly

ATP Steps: Open camera → capture → verify storage error
ATP Expected: When storage is full capturing shows an error
User should be able to switch cameras repeatedly
